servinfo.title: Engine and Emission Control System Check
servinfo.ptxt: Refer to the following items for the details of each step.

test1.ptxt: Perform customer complaint analysis referring to Step 1: Customer Complaint Analysis .

testgroup.title: DTC / Freeze frame data check, record and clearance

test1.ptxt: Check for DTCs (including pending DTCs) referring to Step 2: DTC / Freeze Frame Data Check, Record and Clearance .

testgroup.question: Is there any DTC(s) / Freeze frame data?

action.ptxt: Print DTCs and freeze frame data or write them down and clear them referring to DTC Clearance , and go to Step 3.

test1.ptxt: Perform visual inspection referring to Visual Inspection .

action.ptxt: Repair or replace defective part, and go to Step 11.

test1.ptxt: Perform visual inspection referring to Visual Inspection .

action.ptxt: Repair or replace defective part, and go to Step 11.

test1.ptxt: Confirm trouble symptom referring to Step 5: Trouble Symptom Confirmation .

testgroup.title: Rechecking and recording DTC / Freeze frame data

test1.ptxt: Recheck for DTC and freeze frame data referring to DTC Check .

testgroup.question: Is there any DTC(s)?

testgroup.title: Rechecking and recording DTC / Freeze frame data

test1.ptxt: Recheck for DTC and freeze frame data referring to DTC Check .

testgroup.question: Is there any DTC(s)?

testgroup.title: Engine basic inspection and engine symptom diagnosis

test1.ptxt: Check and repair according to Engine Basic Inspection and Engine Symptom Diagnosis .

testgroup.question: Are check and repair complete?

action.ptxt: Check and repair defective part(s), and go to Step 11.

test1.ptxt: Check and repair according to applicable DTC troubleshooting.

action.ptxt: Check and repair defective part(s), and go to Step 11.

test1.ptxt: Check for intermittent problems referring to Step 10: Intermittent Problems Check .

action.ptxt: Repair or replace defective part(s), and go to Step 11.

testgroup.title: Final confirmation test

test1.ptxt: Perform final confirmation test referring to Step 11: Final Confirmation Test .

testgroup.question: Is there any problem symptom, DTC or abnormal condition?

servinfosub.title: Step 1: Customer Complaint Analysis
servinfosub.ptxt: Record details of the problem (failure, complaint) and how it occurred as described by the customer. For this purpose, use of an inspection form as shown will facilitate collecting information required for proper analysis and diagnosis.

attention3.ptxt: This form is a standard sample. It should be modified according to characteristic of each market.

servinfosub.title: Step 2: DTC / Freeze Frame Data Check, Record and Clearance
servinfosub.ptxt: If DTC is indicated, print it and freeze frame data or write them down and then clear them.

servinfosub.title: Steps 3 and 4: Visual Inspection
servinfosub.ptxt: As a preliminary step, be sure to perform visual check of the items that support proper function of the engine.

topic.title: If there is no DTC in Step 2:
topic.ptxt: Based on information obtained in Step 1: Customer Complaint Analysis and Step 2: DTC / Freeze Frame Data Check, Record and Clearance , confirm trouble symptoms.

topic.title: If there is any DTC in Step 2:
topic.ptxt: Recheck DTC according to “DTC Confirmation Procedure” described in each DTC troubleshooting.

servinfosub.title: Steps 6 and 7: Rechecking and Record in DTC / Freeze Frame Data
servinfosub.ptxt: Refer to DTC Check for checking procedure.

servinfosub.title: Step 8: Engine Basic Inspection and Engine Symptom Diagnosis

s1.ptxt: If there is no faulty part found in inspection procedure of “Engine basic inspection”, perform Engine Symptom Diagnosis based on symptom found in vehicle checking in the following steps.

servinfosub.title: Step 9: Troubleshooting for DTC
servinfosub.ptxt: Perform applicable DTC troubleshooting and repair or replace faulty parts.

topic.title: If there is no DTC in Step 2:
If there is any DTC in Step 2:
topic.ptxt: Check parts related to detected DTC (e.g., wire harness, connector, etc.).

servinfosub.title: Step 11: Final Confirmation Test
servinfosub.ptxt: Confirm that the problem symptom has gone and engine is free from any abnormal conditions. If what has been repaired is related to DTC, clear DTC once, perform DTC confirmation procedure and confirm that no DTC is indicated.
